lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਸਮ ਭਏ ਨਾਨਕ ਜਸੁ ਗਾਵਤ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਗੁਨੀ ਗਹੀਰ ॥੨॥੨॥੩॥
lines.translit: bisam bhe naanak jas gaavat tthaakur gunee gaheer |2|2|3|
lines.english: Nanak blossoms forth in ecstasy, singing the Lord's Praises; my Lord and Master is the ocean of virtue. ||2||2||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੁਲੇ ਭ੍ਰਮ ਭੀਤਿ ਮਿਲੇ ਗੋਪਾਲਾ ਹੀਰੈ ਬੇਧੇ ਹੀਰ ॥
lines.translit: khule bhram bheet mile gopaalaa heerai bedhe heer |
lines.english: The doors of doubt are thrown open, and I have met the Lord of the World; God's diamond has pierced the diamond of my mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪਨਾ ਜਨੁ ਆਪਹਿ ਆਪਿ ਉਧਾਰਿਓ ॥
lines.translit: apanaa jan aapeh aap udhaario |
lines.english: He Himself saves His humble servant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਟ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: natt mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Nat, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਠ ਪਹਰ ਜਨ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਬਸਿਓ ਮਨ ਤੇ ਨਾਹਿ ਬਿਸਾਰਿਓ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aatth pehar jan kai sang basio man te naeh bisaario |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Twenty-four hours a day, He dwells with His humble servant; He never forgets him from His Mind. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਰਨੁ ਚਿਹਨੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਕਿਛੁ ਪੇਖਿਓ ਦਾਸ ਕਾ ਕੁਲੁ ਨ ਬਿਚਾਰਿਓ ॥
lines.translit: baran chihan naahee kichh pekhio daas kaa kul na bichaario |
lines.english: The Lord does not look at his color or form; He does not consider the ancestry of His slave.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਾ ਬਿਖਮੁ ਅਗਨਿ ਕਾ ਸਾਗਰੁ ਤਿਸ ਤੇ ਪਾਰਿ ਉਤਾਰਿਓ ॥
lines.translit: mahaa bikham agan kaa saagar tis te paar utaario |
lines.english: The ocean of fire is treacherous and difficult, but he is carried across.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਹਰਿ ਦੀਓ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਇ ਸਵਾਰਿਓ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa naam har deeo sehaj subhaae savaario |1|
lines.english: Granting His Grace, the Lord blesses him with His Name, and embellishes him with intuitive ease. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੇਖਿ ਪੇਖਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਬਿਗਸਾਨੋ ਪੁਨਹ ਪੁਨਹ ਬਲਿਹਾਰਿਓ ॥੨॥੩॥੪॥
lines.translit: pekh pekh naanak bigasaano punah punah balihaario |2|3|4|
lines.english: Seeing, seeing Him, Nanak blossoms forth, over and over again, a sacrifice to Him. ||2||3||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਹਿਓ ॥
lines.translit: har har man meh naam kahio |
lines.english: One who chants the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, within his mind

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਅਪ੍ਰਾਧ ਮਿਟਹਿ ਖਿਨ ਭੀਤਰਿ ਤਾ ਕਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਨ ਰਹਿਓ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kott apraadh mitteh khin bheetar taa kaa dukh na rahio |1| rahaau |
lines.english: - millions of sins are erased in an instant, and pain is relieved. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਟ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: natt mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Nat, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੋਜਤ ਖੋਜਤ ਭਇਓ ਬੈਰਾਗੀ ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗਿ ਲਹਿਓ ॥
lines.translit: khojat khojat bheo bairaagee saadhoo sang lahio |
lines.english: Seeking and searching, I have become detached; I have found the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲ ਤਿਆਗਿ ਏਕ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਗੀ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਚਰਨ ਗਹਿਓ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sagal tiaag ek liv laagee har har charan gahio |1|
lines.english: Renouncing everything, I am lovingly focused on the One Lord. I grab hold of the feet of the Lord, Har, Har. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਤ ਮੁਕਤ ਸੁਨਤੇ ਨਿਸਤਾਰੇ ਜੋ ਜੋ ਸਰਨਿ ਪਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: kehat mukat sunate nisataare jo jo saran peo |
lines.english: Whoever chants His Name is liberated; whoever listens to it is saved, as is anyone who seeks His Sanctuary.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਅਪੁਨਾ ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਅਨਦੁ ਭਇਓ ॥੨॥੪॥੫॥
lines.translit: simar simar suaamee prabh apunaa kahu naanak anad bheo |2|4|5|
lines.english: Meditating, meditating in remembrance on God the Lord and Master, says Nanak, I am in ecstasy! ||2||4||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਟ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: natt mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Nat, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਸੰਗਿ ਲਾਗੀ ਡੋਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: charan kamal sang laagee ddoree |
lines.english: I am in love with Your Lotus Feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਚਲਾ ਗਹਾਇਓ ਜਨ ਅਪੁਨੇ ਕਉ ਮਨੁ ਬੀਧੋ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਕੀ ਖੋਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: anchalaa gahaaeo jan apune kau man beedho prem kee khoree |
lines.english: He has inspired His humble servant to grasp the hem of His robe; his mind is pierced through with the intoxication of divine love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖ ਸਾਗਰ ਕਰਿ ਪਰਮ ਗਤਿ ਮੋਰੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sukh saagar kar param gat moree |1| rahaau |
lines.english: O Lord, ocean of peace, please bless me with the supreme status. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਨ ਪੂਰਿ ਰਹੇ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਨਿਧਿ ਆਨ ਨ ਪੇਖਉ ਹੋਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: pooran poor rahe kirapaa nidh aan na pekhau horee |
lines.english: The Lord, the ocean of mercy, is all-pervading, permeating everywhere; I do not see any other at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਸੁ ਗਾਵਤ ਭਗਤਿ ਰਸੁ ਉਪਜਿਓ ਮਾਇਆ ਕੀ ਜਾਲੀ ਤੋਰੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jas gaavat bhagat ras upajio maaeaa kee jaalee toree |1|
lines.english: Singing His Praises, love wells up within the devotee, and the trap of Maya is broken. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਟ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: natt mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Nat, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਮੇਲਿ ਲੀਓ ਦਾਸੁ ਅਪੁਨਾ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਨ ਕਬਹੂ ਥੋਰੀ ॥੨॥੫॥੬॥
lines.translit: naanak mel leeo daas apunaa preet na kabahoo thoree |2|5|6|
lines.english: He has united slave Nanak with Himself; His Love never diminishes. ||2||5||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਬਹੂ ਨ ਬਿਸਰਹੁ ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਤੇ ਆਠ ਪਹਰ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਇਣ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kabahoo na bisarahu man mere te aatth pehar gun gaaein |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I shall never forget Him from my mind; twenty-four hours a day, I sing His Glorious Praises. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਜਪੁ ਜਪਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਰਾਇਣ ॥
lines.translit: mere man jap jap har naaraaein |
lines.english: O my mind, chant, and meditate on the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧੂ ਧੂਰਿ ਕਰਉ ਨਿਤ ਮਜਨੁ ਸਭ ਕਿਲਬਿਖ ਪਾਪ ਗਵਾਇਣ ॥
lines.translit: saadhoo dhoor krau nit majan sabh kilabikh paap gavaaein |
lines.english: I take my daily cleansing bath in the dust of the feet of the Holy, and I am rid of all my sins.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਨ ਪੂਰਿ ਰਹੇ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਨਿਧਿ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਦਿਸਟਿ ਸਮਾਇਣੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: pooran poor rahe kirapaa nidh ghatt ghatt disatt samaaein |1|
lines.english: The Lord, the ocean of mercy, is all-pervading, permeating everywhere; He is seen to be contained in each and every heart. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਪ ਤਾਪ ਕੋਟਿ ਲਖ ਪੂਜਾ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਣ ਤੁਲਿ ਨ ਲਾਇਣ ॥
lines.translit: jaap taap kott lakh poojaa har simaran tul na laaein |
lines.english: Hundreds of thousands and millions of meditations, austerities and worships are not equal to remembering the Lord in meditation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਇ ਕਰ ਜੋੜਿ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਦਾਨੁ ਮਾਂਗੈ ਤੇਰੇ ਦਾਸਨਿ ਦਾਸ ਦਸਾਇਣੁ ॥੨॥੬॥੭॥
lines.translit: due kar jorr naanak daan maangai tere daasan daas dasaaein |2|6|7|
lines.english: With his palms pressed together, Nanak begs for this blessing, that he may become the slave of the slaves of Your slaves. ||2||6||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਟ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: natt mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Nat, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੈ ਸਰਬਸੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: merai sarabas naam nidhaan |
lines.english: The treasure of the Naam, the Name of the Lord, is everything for me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਦੁਖ ਭੰਜਨਹਾਰਾ ਗਾਉ ਕੀਰਤਨੁ ਪੂਰਨ ਗਿਆਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: sukhadaataa dukh bhanjanahaaraa gaau keeratan pooran giaan |
lines.english: Sing the Kirtan, the Praises of the Lord, the Giver of peace, the Destroyer of pain; He shall bless you with perfect spiritual wisdom.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗਿ ਮਿਲਿਓ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਦੀਨੋ ਦਾਨੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa saadhoo sang milio satigur deeno daan |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Granting His Grace, He has led me to join the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy; the True Guru has granted this gift. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਆ ਗੁਣ ਤੇਰੇ ਆਖਿ ਵਖਾਣਾ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਅੰਤਰਜਾਮੀ ਜਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: kiaa gun tere aakh vakhaanaa prabh antarajaamee jaan |
lines.english: What Glorious Virtues of Yours should I chant? O God, You are the Inner-knower, the Searcher of hearts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮੁ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਲੋਭੁ ਖੰਡ ਖੰਡ ਕੀਨੑੇ ਬਿਨਸਿਓ ਮੂੜ ਅਭਿਮਾਨੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh lobh khandd khandd keenae binasio moorr abhimaan |1|
lines.english: Sexual desire, anger and greed shall be shattered and destroyed, and your foolish ego will be dispelled. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਸਰਨਿ ਸੁਖ ਸਾਗਰ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਸਦ ਕੁਰਬਾਨੁ ॥੨॥੭॥੮॥
lines.translit: charan kamal saran sukh saagar naanak sad kurabaan |2|7|8|
lines.english: I seek the Sanctuary of Your Lotus Feet, O Lord, ocean of peace; Nanak is forever a sacrifice to You. ||2||7||8||
